name: Click Me
overview:
Lovememory premieres GL side story “Click Me” from Deep Office!. The story begins when a young woman mistakenly enters the wrong building and receives an unexpected offer to work as a model.

What starts as a professional relationship between photographer and muse begins to transform over time. Between photo shoots and silent glances, an intense connection develops where desire and emotional closeness become inevitable.

trailers.title: [SUB] GL Drama " Click me / 클릭미"  Teaser
